basic_details.job_title: NIT Silchar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: NIT Silchar is recruiting 1 JRF for a 3-year ANRF project in the Department of Civil Engineering.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit: 28 years (relaxation as per GoI rules)
qualification.education_qualification: M.E./M.Tech. in Structural / Structural Dynamics / Aerospace / Applied Mechanics / Mechanical Design or relevant specializations with minimum 60% marks / 6.5 CGPA
qualification.experience: Knowledge of Finite Element software, MATLAB, experimental structural dynamics (GATE preferred)

vacancy_details.details: Total Posts: 01 Position: Junior Research Fellow (JRF)

salary_details.details: ₹37,000/- per month for first two years ₹42,000/- per month for third year

how_to_apply: Attach CV and photocopies of all documents.
Send soft copy via email to [email protected].
Submit hard copy to the Principal Investigator.
important_instructions: The position is purely temporary. Performance will be evaluated every year. The Institute reserves the right to restrict the number of candidates. No candidate may be recruited if suitable candidates are not found. Selected candidates shall sign an agreement at the time of joining.

content_sections.heading: NIT Silchar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: NIT Silchar is recruiting 1 JRF for a 3-year ANRF project in the Department of Civil Engineering.

content_sections.heading: NIT Silchar JRF Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: Total Posts: 01 Position: Junior Research Fellow (JRF)

content_sections.heading: NIT Silchar JRF Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria

rows.details: M.E./M.Tech. in Structural / Structural Dynamics / Aerospace / Applied Mechanics / Mechanical Design or relevant specializations with minimum 60% marks / 6.5 CGPA
Knowledge of Finite Element software, MATLAB, experimental structural dynamics (GATE preferred)

content_sections.heading: NIT Silchar JRF Recruitment 2026 Salary
content_sections.text: ₹37,000/- per month for first two years ₹42,000/- per month for third year

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for NIT Silchar JRF Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Fill the prescribed application format. Attach CV and photocopies of all documents. Send soft copy via email to [email protected] . Submit hard copy to the Principal Investigator. Employed candidates must submit NOC.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for Candidates
content_sections.text: The position is purely temporary. Performance will be evaluated every year. The Institute reserves the right to restrict the number of candidates. No candidate may be recruited if suitable candidates are not found. Selected candidates shall sign an agreement at the time of joining.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Silchar JRF 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of application is 31 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for Junior Research Fellow at NIT Silchar?
faq.answer: ₹37,000/- per month for the first two years and ₹42,000/- per month for the third year.

faq.question: Q3. What is the essential qualification for NIT Silchar JRF position?
faq.answer: M.E./M.Tech. degree in Structural Engineering / Structural Dynamics / Aerospace / Applied Mechanics or relevant fields with minimum 60% marks.

faq.question: Q4. What is the project title for NIT Silchar ANRF JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: Vibroacoustic response reduction in a functionally graded smart composite panel...

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for JRF at NIT Silchar?
faq.answer: Maximum 28 years (relaxation as per Government of India rules).

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for NIT Silchar Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Send filled application with CV and documents via email to [email protected] and hard copy to the PI.

faq.question: Q7. Is GATE qualification mandatory for NIT Silchar JRF?
faq.answer: GATE qualification is desirable and will be given preference.

faq.question: Q8. What is the duration of the JRF position at NIT Silchar?
faq.answer: Three years or till the closure of the project, whichever is earlier.

faq.question: Q9. Who is the Principal Investigator for the ANRF project at NIT Silchar?
faq.answer: Dr. Atanu Sahu, Department of Civil Engineering.

faq.question: Q10. Will there be an interview for NIT Silchar JRF selection?
faq.answer: Yes, shortlisted candidates will be informed about the interview date and mode (online/offline) via email.
